class \mbox{\hyperlink{classGreenFHom3DPer2D}{Green\+FHom3\+DPer2D}}

\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Periodic homogeneous 3D Green\textquotesingle{}s function with {\bfseries{2D in‑plane periodicity}}. 

Implements a Bloch‑periodic free‑space Green\textquotesingle{}s function for structures periodic along two lattice vectors (a1, a2) in an otherwise homogeneous medium. Convergence is accelerated via {\bfseries{Ewald splitting}} into a spatial (real‑space images) sum and a spectral (reciprocal‑lattice) sum. Both the scalar kernel and its source‑gradient are provided, together with RWG‑weighted triangle integrals used in the SIE formulation and post‑processing. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{GreenFHom3DPer2D_8h_source}{Green\+FHom3\+DPer2\+D.\+h}}.
